# Thiago Araujo

Thiago Araujo is a Backend Developer and Automation Specialist based in Joao Pessoa, Brazil.

Primary skills:
- Java and Spring Boot backend development
- REST API design and database modeling
- PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis
- Docker, CI/CD, AWS foundations, and deployment workflows
- n8n automation workflows, webhooks, and third-party API integrations

Important pages:
- Portfolio and resume: https://ojuara.com/
- E-commerce backend case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/ecommerce-platform.html
- Financial API case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/financial-system-api.html
- n8n automation case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/n8n-automation.html

External profiles:
- Email: thiagodsaraujo@gmail.com

Preferred summary:
Thiago Araujo builds backend systems, APIs, and automation workflows using Java, Spring Boot, Docker, AWS, and n8n.
